title: LEGO ǀ Marvel Avengers: Endgame Thor vs. Chitauri - Building Toy with a Mech, Gorilla Figure & 7 Minifigures incl. Thor, Rocket & Iron Patriot - Super Hero Gift for 8+ Year Old Boys - 76322
features: Super Hero battle action for kids – Avengers: Endgame Thor vs. Chitauri is a buildable LEGO Marvel Avengers toy for 8+ year old boys and girls who are fans of mech toys and action heroes
LEGO Marvel minifigures – The building set features Iron Patriot MK2, Rocket with a large stud shooter, Thor with Stormbreaker, and 4 Chitauri, 2 of which have golden stud shooters
Buildable Super Hero figures for kids – Includes 2 large, buildable LEGO Marvel figures that are jointed for dynamic play: the Iron Patriot mech with 4 stud shooters, and a fearsome Chitauri gorilla
Accessories for action and adventure – Other features include 2 jet scooters and a small environment for the Thor minifigure, where spare shooter studs can be stored

Marvel gift for fans – Treat kids and fans of mech toys, action heroes and the Marvel Studios’ Avengers: Endgame film to this Super Hero buildable playset, which makes a great gift for 8+ year old boys and girls
3D building instructions – Kids can download the LEGO Builder app for an immersive building experience, with digital tools to zoom in and rotate models in 3D, save sets and track progress
Buildable LEGO Marvel sets – The extensive range of LEGO Marvel build-and-play sets gives kids an ever-changing universe of hands-on Super Hero adventures
description: From the manufacturer Join an iconic movie battle scene Put mech-vs-monster action from Marvel Studios’ Avengers: Endgame into kids’ hands with Iron Patriot MK2, Rocket and Thor. Articulated figures for posable play The large, buildable Iron Patriot mech and a fearsome Chitauri gorilla are jointed to inspire dynamic action. LEGO | Marvel Avengers: Endgame Thor vs. Chitauri Iron Patriot mech 4 stud shooters make the jointed mech a mighty battle machine. Chitauri gorilla Chitauri warriors attack with their mega gorilla. Accessories for battle action 2 jet scooters and other accessories inspire imaginative play. Enter a digital world of building Builders can zoom in, rotate sets in 3D and track their progress using the fun, intuitive LEGO Builder app. Expand the fun Discover more imaginative Super Hero fun for kids among the extensive range of LEGO | Marvel building sets (sold separately).
